configurations.name: Banana API
configurations.command: bash -lc 'cd src/c-sharp/asp.net && ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development ASPNETCORE_URLS=http://127.0.0.1:8080 BANANA_NATIVE_PATH="$PWD/../../../build/native/bin/Release" BANANA_PG_CONNECTION="host=127.0.0.1 port=5432 user=cinterop password=cinterop dbname=cinterop" dotnet run -c Debug --no-build'

linux.command: bash -lc 'cd src/c-sharp/asp.net && ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development ASPNETCORE_URLS=http://127.0.0.1:8080 BANANA_NATIVE_PATH="$PWD/../../../build/native/bin" BANANA_PG_CONNECTION="host=127.0.0.1 port=5432 user=cinterop password=cinterop dbname=cinterop" dotnet run -c Debug --no-build'

osx.command: bash -lc 'cd src/c-sharp/asp.net && ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Development ASPNETCORE_URLS=http://127.0.0.1:8080 BANANA_NATIVE_PATH="$PWD/../../../build/native/bin" BANANA_PG_CONNECTION="host=127.0.0.1 port=5432 user=cinterop password=cinterop dbname=cinterop" dotnet run -c Debug --no-build'
